name: RadioGroup
description: Grouped radio buttons with horizontal or vertical layout.

api.name: RadioGroup
api.description: Grouped radio buttons with horizontal or vertical layout.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the group as required, adding an asterisk to the label and setting aria-required.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Renders the group in an invalid/error state. Also set implicitly when inside a FormField that has a validation error.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the group when Invalid is true and the group isn't inside a FormField (which renders its own error text).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the group when there's no error, and the group isn't inside a FormField.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label rendered above the group. Ignored when inside a FormField, which renders its own label.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: When set, emits a hidden input with this name carrying the selected value, so the group participates in native form submission (the role=radio items aren't native inputs).

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The group's RadioGroupItem or RadioGroupCard options.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The currently-selected item's value.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Invoked when a different item is selected (click, or arrow-key navigation).

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name for the role="radiogroup" element when there's no visible Label.

parameters.name: AriaLabelledBy
parameters.description: Id of an external element that labels the group, set as aria-labelledby.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-group density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the inter-option row gap shifts between values.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the role="radiogroup" element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the role="radiogroup" element.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Invoked when a different item is selected (click, or arrow-key navigation).

records.name: RadioGroupContext

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<RadioGroup @bind-Value="_selected">
    <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
        <RadioGroupItem Value="default" />
        <Label>Default</Label>
    </Flex>
    <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
        <RadioGroupItem Value="comfortable" />
        <Label>Comfortable</Label>
    </Flex>
    <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
        <RadioGroupItem Value="compact" />
        <Label>Compact</Label>
    </Flex>
</RadioGroup>

examples.title: Pricing Plan
examples.code:
<RadioGroup @bind-Value="_plan" Class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
    @foreach (var p in new[] { ("free", "Free", "$0"), ("pro", "Pro", "$15"), ("team", "Team", "$49") })
    {
        <label class="@($"flex flex-col items-center rounded-md border p-3 cursor-pointer {(_plan == p.Item1 ? \"border-primary\" : \"border-muted\")}")>
            <RadioGroupItem Value="@p.Item1" Class="sr-only" />
            <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="semibold">@p.Item2</Lumeo.Text>
            <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="xs" Color="muted">@p.Item3/mo</Lumeo.Text>
        </label>
    }
</RadioGroup>

examples.title: With Form Field
examples.code:
<FormField Name="plan">
    <FormItem>
        <FormLabel>Notification preference</FormLabel>
        <RadioGroup @bind-Value="_notification">
            <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
                <RadioGroupItem Value="all" />
                <Label>All notifications</Label>
            </Flex>
            <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
                <RadioGroupItem Value="mentions" />
                <Label>Mentions only</Label>
            </Flex>
        </RadioGroup>
        <FormDescription>Choose how you want to be notified.</FormDescription>
    </FormItem>
</FormField>

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The card's content (typically a title/description).

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: This card's value. Selected when it matches the enclosing RadioGroup's Value.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the card's button element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the card's button element.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: This item's value. Selected when it matches the enclosing RadioGroup's Value.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the item, removing it from click/keyboard activation and arrow-key roving.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: Muted helper text rendered beside the radio dot, below ChildContent. When set, the item also renders an adjacent label wrapper instead of a bare button.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The item's label content, shown next to the radio dot (or above Description).

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name for the radio button. Falls back to Value when no external label/ChildContent supplies one.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the radio button element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the radio button element.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The group's RadioGroupItem or RadioGroupCard options.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The item's label content, shown next to the radio dot (or above Description).

mdSummary:
# RadioGroup

Grouped radio buttons with horizontal or vertical layout.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Selection
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/radio-group

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| RadioGroup | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroup | Required | `bool` | `` | Marks the group as required, adding an asterisk to the label and setting aria-required. |
| RadioGroup | Invalid | `bool` | `` | Renders the group in an invalid/error state. Also set implicitly when inside a FormField that has a validation error. |
| RadioGroup | ErrorText | `string?` | `` | Error message shown below the group when Invalid is true and the group isn't inside a FormField (which renders its own error text). |
| RadioGroup | HelperText | `string?` | `` | Helper text shown below the group when there's no error, and the group isn't inside a FormField. |
| RadioGroup | Label | `string?` | `` | Label rendered above the group. Ignored when inside a FormField, which renders its own label. |
| RadioGroup | Name | `string?` | `` | When set, emits a hidden input with this name carrying the selected value, so the group participates in native form submission (the role=radio items aren't native inputs). |
| RadioGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The group's RadioGroupItem or RadioGroupCard options. |
| RadioGroup | Value | `string?` | `` | The currently-selected item's value. |
| RadioGroup | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string>` | `` | Invoked when a different item is selected (click, or arrow-key navigation). |
| RadioGroup | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible name for the role="radiogroup" element when there's no visible Label. |
| RadioGroup | AriaLabelledBy | `string?` | `` | Id of an external element that labels the group, set as aria-labelledby. |
| RadioGroup | Density | `Density?` | `` | Per-group density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the inter-option row gap shifts between values. |
| RadioGroup | InheritedDensity | `Density?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroup | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the role="radiogroup" element. |
| RadioGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the role="radiogroup" element. |
| RadioGroupCard | Context | `RadioGroup.RadioGroupContext` | `default!` |  |
| RadioGroupCard | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The card's content (typically a title/description). |
| RadioGroupCard | Value | `string` | `""` | This card's value. Selected when it matches the enclosing RadioGroup's Value. |
| RadioGroupCard | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the card's button element. |
| RadioGroupCard | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the card's button element. |
| RadioGroupItem | Context | `RadioGroup.RadioGroupContext` | `default!` |  |
| RadioGroupItem | Value | `string` | `""` | This item's value. Selected when it matches the enclosing RadioGroup's Value. |
| RadioGroupItem | Disabled | `bool` | `` | Disables the item, removing it from click/keyboard activation and arrow-key roving. |
| RadioGroupItem | Description | `string?` | `` | Muted helper text rendered beside the radio dot, below ChildContent. When set, the item also renders an adjacent label wrapper instead of a bare button. |
| RadioGroupItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The item's label content, shown next to the radio dot (or above Description). |
| RadioGroupItem | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible name for the radio button. Falls back to Value when no external label/ChildContent supplies one. |
| RadioGroupItem | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the radio button element. |
| RadioGroupItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the radio button element. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (RadioGroup) — The group's RadioGroupItem or RadioGroupCard options.
- `ChildContent` (RadioGroupCard) — The card's content (typically a title/description).
- `ChildContent` (RadioGroupItem) — The item's label content, shown next to the radio dot (or above Description).

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string>`) — Invoked when a different item is selected (click, or arrow-key navigation).

## Sub-components
- `RadioGroupCard`, `RadioGroupItem`

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)
- `InheritedDensity` (`Density?`)
- `Context` (`RadioGroup.RadioGroupContext`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<RadioGroup />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/RadioGroup/RadioGroup.razor`
- `UI/RadioGroup/RadioGroupCard.razor`
- `UI/RadioGroup/RadioGroupItem.razor`
